title: Well-formed cache-aside with singleflight + TTL jitter + null caching
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements production-grade cache-aside: (1) singleflight prevents stampede on hot key miss, (2) TTL with jitter prevents avalanche, (3) null-value caching prevents penetration from non-existent IDs, (4) Redis error falls through to DB (degradation path), (5) key naming follows namespace convention.
